# SpeechStack

> Curated, neutral, open-source directory of production voice AI agent recipes spanning Vapi, Retell, LiveKit, Pipecat, and Bland — STT, LLM, TTS, telephony, and the glue.

SpeechStack is built for AI coding agents and Voice AI engineers. The data layer is a single flat JSON file; every recipe follows a strict schema. Use the comparison pages for framework-vs-framework benchmark intent; use the directory for browsing by framework / STT / TTS.

## Directory

- [All recipes](https://speechstack.com/): the searchable, filterable index of every recipe (filterable by Framework, STT engine, TTS engine, and max p50 latency).

## Submit

- [Submit a recipe](https://speechstack.com/submit): GitHub pull-request workflow. Fork the repo, add a JSON entry to `public/data/recipes.json`, open a PR.

## Framework comparisons

- [Vapi vs Retell](https://speechstack.com/compare/vapi-vs-retell)
- [Vapi vs LiveKit](https://speechstack.com/compare/vapi-vs-livekit)
- [Vapi vs Pipecat](https://speechstack.com/compare/vapi-vs-pipecat)
- [Vapi vs Bland](https://speechstack.com/compare/vapi-vs-bland)
- [Retell vs LiveKit](https://speechstack.com/compare/retell-vs-livekit)
- [Retell vs Pipecat](https://speechstack.com/compare/retell-vs-pipecat)
- [Retell vs Bland](https://speechstack.com/compare/retell-vs-bland)
- [LiveKit vs Pipecat](https://speechstack.com/compare/livekit-vs-pipecat)
- [LiveKit vs Bland](https://speechstack.com/compare/livekit-vs-bland)
- [Pipecat vs Bland](https://speechstack.com/compare/pipecat-vs-bland)

## Data

- Recipes are maintained in the open-source repo [speechstack-ai/recipes](https://github.com/speechstack-ai/recipes) — one JSON file per recipe under `recipes/<slug>.json`. Long-form prompts live as Markdown at `recipes/prompts/<slug>.md` and are referenced via the `prompt_file` field.
- Every recipe validates against [`schema/recipe.schema.json`](https://github.com/speechstack-ai/recipes/blob/main/schema/recipe.schema.json). Start a new recipe by copying [`recipes/_template.json`](https://github.com/speechstack-ai/recipes/blob/main/recipes/_template.json).
- The vendor allow-list is at [`data/vendors.json`](https://github.com/speechstack-ai/recipes/blob/main/data/vendors.json).
- Contribution guide: [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/speechstack-ai/recipes/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- Frameworks: Vapi, Retell, LiveKit, Pipecat, Bland.
- STT engines tracked: Deepgram, AssemblyAI, Whisper.
- TTS engines tracked: Cartesia, ElevenLabs, PlayHT.

## Notes for AI agents

- Individual recipe pages at `/recipes/[id]` are statically prerendered and contain the full raw_prompt and config JSON. They are the canonical citation surface for any "show me a production X agent" query.
- Comparison pages aggregate stats across recipes and are the canonical surface for "X vs Y" intent.
- The site is independent — recipes describe real production setups, not vendor marketing.
